# freeswitch_user_registration (Data Source)

Runtime SIP registration state for a user (via ESL `show registrations`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Runtime SIP registration state for a user (queried over ESL).
data "freeswitch_user_registration" "u2001" {
  user   = "2001"
  domain = "192.168.48.143"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String)
- `user` (String)

### Read-Only

- `agent` (String)
- `contact` (String)
- `expires` (String)
- `network_ip` (String)
- `network_port` (String)
- `registered` (Boolean)
